'''Limna Yith''' was a one-time agent of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. She was born on [[Kerest/Legends|Kerest]] after the collapse of its civilization, becoming a ruthless mercenary. Amongst other misdeeds, she was implicated in the bombing of the [[Alaspin casino]], killing the criminal [[Kassandre family]] in the process. She attacked and seized a spice shipment over [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] at the behest of [[Kutuab]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], she was hired by [[Bel Att]], an [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] enforcer employed by [[Sprax]], to accompany him on an attack the mining colony of [[Yen-2]] in the [[Verde system/Legends|Verde system]], which had refused to pay protection to the cartel. When she discovered a [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] containing detailed information on Black Sun's organization, including names, in the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], she realized its value, and betrayed and killed the Iotran. Shortly thereafter she arrived on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]]. As soon as Sprax realized what had been lost, he hired independent smugglers through [[Mal Biron]] to recover the information. At the same time, [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] himself ordered [[Ket Maliss]] to recover the data. The smugglers recovered both Yith and the datacard on the planet [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]] and returned her for punishment to Biron.<ref name="SotSR" />
